subjective: Patient reports increased thirst, frequent urination, and fatigue over the past 3 weeks. No prior diabetes diagnosis. Denies chest pain or blurred vision.
objective: Vitals: BP 138/86, HR 82, BMI 31.2. Random plasma glucose 248 mg/dL. Fasting glucose repeated at 212 mg/dL. No acanthosis nigricans noted.
assessment: New-onset type 2 diabetes mellitus, likely contributed to by obesity. Elevated blood pressure noted, monitor for hypertension.
